# RIDDOR Reporting Drill — Tabletop Minutes

**Template:** TEMPLATE-RIDDOR-DRILL-MINUTES  
**Version:** 1.0.0  
**Owner:** HR / Health & Safety  
**Procedure:** [PROC-HSE-001](../procedures/PROC-HSE-001-Workplace-Health-Safety.md)  
**Evidence slot:** CERT-009 (`riddor-drill-*` in `docs/evidence/certifications/`)

---

## 1. Drill metadata

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Drill ID | DRILL-YYYY-MM-### |
| Date | YYYY-MM-DD |
| Facilitator | |
| H&S lead (named role) | |
| Attendees | |
| Scenario summary | |

---

## 2. Scenario

Describe the simulated reportable incident (e.g. specified injury, dangerous occurrence, occupational disease). Include:

- Location and time discovered  
- Persons affected  
- Immediate actions taken  
- Whether reportable under RIDDOR (yes/no + rationale)

---

## 3. Reporting pathway exercised

| Step | Owner | Completed (Y/N) | Notes |
|------|-------|-----------------|-------|
| First aid / emergency response | | | |
| Internal incident log (PROC-HSE-001) | | | |
| H&S lead assessment | | | |
| HSE online report (if reportable) | | | |
| ICO / DPO notification (if personal data involved) | | | |
| Post-incident review scheduled | | | |

---

## 4. Gaps and actions

| Gap | Action | Owner | Due date |
|-----|--------|-------|----------|
| | | | |

---

## 5. Sign-off

| Role | Name | Date |
|------|------|------|
| H&S lead | | |
| ISMS Lead (if data breach crossover) | | |

**Storage:** Save completed minutes to `docs/evidence/certifications/riddor-drill-YYYY-MM-<slug>.pdf` (or `.md`).
